languages.text: "Прошение зафиксировано и одобрено. Ожидаю возможности обменяться знаниями с братом во служении".

traits.locale_text: [ДРАФТ] "Прошение зафиксировано и одобрено. Ожидаю возможности обменяться знаниями с достопочтенным магосом".
"Прошение зафиксировано и одобрено. Ожидаю возможности обменяться знаниями с братом во служении".

languages.text: "Petition registered and approved. I am anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother of the faith."
languages.original_text: "Прошение зафиксировано и одобрено. Ожидаю возможности обменяться знаниями с братом во служении".

traits.locale_text: "Petition registered and approved. Anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother in service."
"Petition registered and approved. Anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with the esteemed Magos."
"Petition registered and approved. Anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with the esteemed Magos."
"Petition registered and approved. Anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother in service."
"Petition registered and approved. I am anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother of the faith."

languages.text: 「請願書が登録され承認されました。尊敬されるマゴス氏と知識を交換する機会を期待しています」
languages.original_text: "Petition registered and approved. Anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with the esteemed Magos."

traits.locale_text: 「請願書が登録され承認されました。尊敬されるマゴス氏と知識を交換する機会を期待しています。」

languages.text: "Anfrage registriert und genehmigt. Ich weiß die Gelegenheit zu schätzen, mit einem Bruder des Glaubens Wissen auszutauschen."
languages.original_text: "Petition registered and approved. I am anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother of the faith."

traits.locale_text: "Petition registriert und genehmigt. Ich freue mich auf die Gelegenheit zum Wissensaustausch mit den geschätzten Magos."
"Anfrage registriert und genehmigt. Ich weiß die Gelegenheit zu schätzen, mit einem Bruder des Glaubens Wissen auszutauschen."

languages.text: « Demande reçue et approuvée. J'attends avec impatience l'occasion d'échanger des connaissances avec un frère de foi. »
languages.original_text: "Petition registered and approved. I am anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother of the faith."

traits.locale_text: "Pétition enregistrée et approuvée. J'attends avec impatience l'occasion d'échanger des connaissances avec les estimés Magos."
« Demande reçue et approuvée. J'attends avec impatience l'occasion d'échanger des connaissances avec un frère de foi. »

languages.text: «Petición registrada y aprobada. Ansío la oportunidad de intercambiar conocimiento con un hermano de la fe».
languages.original_text: "Petition registered and approved. I am anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother of the faith."

traits.locale_text: "Petición registrada y aprobada. Anticipando la oportunidad de intercambiar conocimientos con los estimados Magos".
«Petición registrada y aprobada. Ansío la oportunidad de intercambiar conocimiento con un hermano de la fe».

languages.text: "Dilekçe kaydedildi ve onaylandı. Din kardeşimle irfan alışverişinde bulunma fırsatını dört gözle bekliyorum."
languages.original_text: "Petition registered and approved. I am anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother of the faith."

traits.locale_text: "Dilekçe kaydedildi ve onaylandı. Saygıdeğer Magos ile bilgi alışverişinde bulunma fırsatını bekliyorum."
"Dilekçe kaydedildi ve onaylandı. Din kardeşimle irfan alışverişinde bulunma fırsatını dört gözle bekliyorum."

languages.text: “申请已登记并获批准。我很期待能有机会与一位信仰同道交流知识。”
languages.original_text: "Petition registered and approved. I am anticipating the opportunity to exchange knowledge with a brother of the faith."

traits.locale_text: “申请已登记并获批准。我很期待能有机会与一位信仰同道交流知识。”
